weapons.name: Training Sword
weapons.description: A standard-issue Compact training blade.

weapons.name: Valdris Blade
weapons.description: A reliable blade forged in the smithies of Valdris.

weapons.name: Knight's Edge
weapons.description: A keen-edged sword favored by Compact knights.

weapons.name: Mythril Sword
weapons.description: A lightweight sword forged from mythril ore.

weapons.name: Compact Saber
weapons.description: A saber built from stolen Compact military blueprints.

weapons.name: Arcanite Blade
weapons.description: A sword infused with arcanite, resonating with magical energy.

weapons.name: Crystal Sword
weapons.description: A translucent blade carved from crystallized ley energy.

weapons.name: Ley-Forged Longsword
weapons.description: A longsword forged in raw ley energy, humming with power.

weapons.name: Pallor Bane
weapons.description: A spirit-imbued blade that burns Pallor creatures on contact.

weapons.name: Edren's Oath
weapons.description: The blade that seals Edren's unbreakable oath to protect the fallen.

weapons.name: Recruit's Claymore
weapons.description: A heavy claymore issued to new recruits.

weapons.name: Commander's Blade
weapons.description: A broad blade befitting a Compact field commander.

weapons.name: War Cleaver
weapons.description: A brutal cleaving blade recovered from a battlefield.

weapons.name: Ironbound Greatsword
weapons.description: A massive greatsword reinforced with iron bands.

weapons.name: Twilight Edge
weapons.description: A dark-hued greatsword that strikes with devastating precision.

weapons.name: Dusk Reaver
weapons.description: A fearsome greatsword available only briefly before Cael's departure.

weapons.name: Scholar's Rod
weapons.description: A simple rod carried by Archive scholars.

weapons.name: Ley Wand
weapons.description: A wand attuned to ambient ley energy.

weapons.name: Glyph Staff
weapons.description: A staff inscribed with ancient glyphs of power.

weapons.name: Mythril Staff
weapons.description: A mythril staff that amplifies the wielder's magical focus.

weapons.name: Runic Focus
weapons.description: A staff etched with runic circuits that channel ley magic.

weapons.name: Resonance Rod
weapons.description: A rod that hums in resonance with the wielder's magical frequency.

weapons.name: Arcane Conduit
weapons.description: A crystalline staff that serves as a direct conduit for arcane power.

weapons.name: Ley Conduit
weapons.description: A staff that draws power directly from the ley lines themselves.

weapons.name: Archive Staff
weapons.description: An ancient staff from the Archive's deepest vaults, attuned to restoration.

weapons.name: Maren's Requiem
weapons.description: A requiem given form, channeling Maren's grief into boundless magic.

weapons.name: Street Knife
weapons.description: A worn knife from the back alleys of Bellhaven.

weapons.name: Stiletto
weapons.description: A slender thrusting blade designed for swift strikes.

weapons.name: Pickpocket's Blade
weapons.description: A blade favored by Bellhaven's light-fingered professionals.

weapons.name: Mythril Dagger
weapons.description: A featherweight mythril dagger that strikes before the eye can follow.

weapons.name: Trick Blade
weapons.description: A cleverly weighted blade that finds weak points with uncanny luck.

weapons.name: Shadowsteel Knife
weapons.description: A knife forged from shadowsteel, nearly invisible in dim light.

weapons.name: Whisper Edge
weapons.description: A blade so sharp its cuts arrive before the sound of the swing.

weapons.name: Twilight Fang
weapons.description: A venomous fang-shaped dagger that poisons with each cut.

weapons.name: Shade Razor
weapons.description: A razor-thin blade suffused with void energy from the Convergence.

weapons.name: Sable's Thread
weapons.description: The thread that binds Sable to her past and cuts her path forward.

weapons.name: Maintenance Wrench
weapons.description: A heavy wrench from Lira's engineering toolkit.

weapons.name: Iron Mallet
weapons.description: A solid iron mallet suitable for both repair work and combat.

weapons.name: Pipe Hammer
weapons.description: A length of heavy pipe repurposed as a crushing weapon.

weapons.name: Compact Sledge
weapons.description: A compact sledgehammer built to Compact military specifications.

weapons.name: Forge Hammer
weapons.description: A hammer still radiating heat from the Ashmark forges.

weapons.name: Forgewright Maul
weapons.description: A master-crafted maul that embodies Lira's forging expertise.

weapons.name: Arcanite Maul
weapons.description: A maul forged from arcanite, devastatingly heavy.

weapons.name: Piston Driver
weapons.description: A pneumatic hammer that delivers bone-jarring impacts.

weapons.name: Architect's Hammer
weapons.description: A hammer crackling with storm energy, taken from the Architect itself.

weapons.name: Lira's Masterwork
weapons.acquired: Crafted from Grey Mist Essence + Arcanite Ingot
weapons.description: Lira's ultimate creation, a hammer that defines the art of the forge.

weapons.name: Cael's Edge
weapons.special: Sever Bond: 1-use 3.0x physical attack ignoring DEF (Vaelith fight only)
weapons.acquired: trial_lira_complete (Pallor Wastes trial, manifests at Vaelith fight)
weapons.description: A weapon born from severed bonds, wielded to end what once was.

weapons.name: Hunting Spear
weapons.description: A simple spear used for hunting game in the wilds.

weapons.name: Iron Lance
weapons.description: A sturdy iron lance with a leaf-shaped blade.

weapons.name: Spirit-Bound Spear
weapons.description: A spear blessed by the Fenmother's departing spirit.

weapons.name: Mythril Spear
weapons.description: A mythril-tipped spear that pierces through heavy armor.

weapons.name: Thornwood Pike
weapons.description: A pike hewn from the ironwood thorns of Thornmere.

weapons.name: Thornspear
weapons.description: A spear forged from Thornmere wood and tempered steel.

weapons.name: Wyrmbone Lance
weapons.description: A lance carved from the bones of an ancient wyrm.

weapons.name: Ley Lance
weapons.description: A lance infused with concentrated ley energy.

weapons.name: Pallor Pike
weapons.description: A spirit-wreathed pike that sears Pallor-tainted foes.

weapons.name: Grey Cleaver (tainted)
weapons.special: Despair at battle start. Cursed weapon — purify through 100 Pallor encounters.
weapons.description: A cursed polearm tainted by the Grey, draining its wielder's will.

weapons.name: Grey Cleaver (purified)
weapons.description: The Grey Cleaver reborn, its curse lifted and spirit power unleashed.
